series_metadata.series_title: Contractually Reqd Submissions Rel. to Coop. Use or Lease of Cultural/Sports/State Hist. Facilities
series_metadata.series_description: All materials submitted in response to obligations in the legal agreements related to the ongoing use of the facility, including fundraising documentation related to ongoing operations.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 1 year after legal agreements expire or are terminated , then destroy. ; Paper: Retain for 1 year after legal agreements expire or are terminated , then destroy., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Wastepaper
